arts.ttl: Jonathan David 'selects preferred club' amid Barcelona, Man United transfer interest
arts.sum: Lille striker Jonathan David reportedly "dreams" of representing Barcelona and is willing to snub offers from elsewhere to join the Catalan giants.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David to Barcelona, Chelsea or Man Utd? The state of play
arts.sum: Jonathan David will leave Lille on a free transfer next summer, but the race to sign him is still heating up, according to a report. Jonathan David to Barcelona, Chelsea or Man Utd?

arts.ttl: Adi Hütter confirms AS Monaco goalkeeper change

arts.ttl: Ilenikhena has a chance to shine in Monaco's attack with Balogun injured
arts.sum: Playing last season for Royal Antwerp in Belgium, Ilenikhena scored 14 goals in all competitions, including a stoppage-time winner against Barcelona in the Champions League. Monaco plays 12 matches leading up to the winter break, including in the Champions League against Balogun’s former club Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Takumi Minamino has ‘image in mind’ of AS Monaco as Ligue 1 champions
